sections.heading: New
items: Text Animation: A preset animation for caption and text clips.
Better Cloud Transcription Model: Introduce a cloud-based transcription model that is much more accurate and auto-detect languages, speakers, and more.
Project management tools: MCP and Agent can now list, create, and open projects.
Color Matte: You can now add a color matte from the media panel.
Predefined layouts: Agent can now apply predefined layouts to clips.
Blend modes: You can now apply blend modes to clips.

sections.heading: Improved
items: More skills: Checkout the new skills in the settings page.
Better FCPXML export: more stable export for fcpxml.

sections.heading: Models
items: Sonnet 5: try out sonnet 5 with the agent chat.
Gemini Omni and Nano Banana Lite: try out the new video/image models by Google.
